content: Dry-run proposals are derived output, not source of truth. They should be gitignored so each run produces them fresh. The session archive in done/ is the only thing committed — proposals are always local and ephemeral. A reset script allows moving sessions back to pending/ and clearing processed flags for re-runs.

provenance.raw_agent: The proposals are derived output, not source of truth. They should be gitignored so each run produces them fresh.
provenance.raw_user: Yes, though we may want to re-run occasionally with blank output so that it can be recreated.
